# ITLibArtwork

**Class**

This class represents the artwork for a media item.

## Declaration

```swift
class ITLibArtwork
```

## Getting Artwork Info

- **image**: The artwork image.
- **imageData**: The raw image data of the artwork in the format that [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtwork/imageDataFormat] specifies.
- **imageDataFormat**: The format of the artwork image data that [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtwork/imageData] returns.

## Artwork Formats

- **ITLibArtworkFormat**: These constants specify the possible formats of the data that [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtwork/imageDataFormat] returns.

## Media Items

- **ITLibMediaItem**: This class describes a media item (a track) in the iTunes library, such as a song, a video, or a podcast.
- **ITLibMediaEntity**: This class describes a media entity, which can be a media item, such as an audio track.
- **ITLibArtist**: This class represents an artist, such as the performer of a song.
- **ITLibMediaItemVideoInfo**: This class encapsulates the video information of a video media item.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
